summary: Closed draft/WIP PR for menu diagram decomp work across mndiagram, mndiagram2, and mndiagram3. The slice adds several function bodies, broad prototype cleanup in related mn headers, and a few extern/static declarations. Bot evidence reports 4 new 100% matches and 13 partial improvements, but the author closed the PR to reorganize with more matches, and there is no human review feedback in the slice.

key_files.role: Main implementation file; added matched/partial function bodies for diagram thresholds, name/fighter totals, digit formatting, selection navigation, cleanup/free logic, animation-loop unlink logic, and GObj/JObj setup.
evidence_refs: diff:mndiagram.c added mnDiagram_8023EA54, GetNameTotalKOs/Falls, GetFighterTotalKOs/Falls, mnDiagram_8023F334, mnDiagram_8023F3A8, mnDiagram_8023F45C, mnDiagram_8023F4CC, mnDiagram_8023FDD8, fn_80240B18, fn_80241AE8, mnDiagram_802433AC
bot_report:4 new matches and multiple mndiagram improvements

key_files.role: Header prototype cleanup; many UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS entries replaced with concrete signatures and HSD_GObj forward include added.
evidence_refs: diff:mndiagram.h prototypes changed from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to typed signatures

key_files.role: Static header update; added extern f32 table declaration for mnDiagram_803EE774.
Implementation file populated from empty/near-empty state with includes and bodies for fn_80244D20, fn_80245028, and mnDiagram2_802453B0.
evidence_refs: bot_report:fn_80245028 new 100% match; fn_80244D20 and mnDiagram2_802453B0 partial improvements

key_files.role: New header guard and prototypes for mndiagram2 functions.
evidence_refs: diff:mndiagram2.h added guard, includes, fn_80244D20, fn_80245028, mnDiagram2_802453B0 prototypes

key_files.role: Added fn_80246E04 animation-loop/unlink body and required externs/includes.
Header prototype update adding fn_80246E04 and address comments.
evidence_refs: diff:mndiagram3.h added fn_80246E04 prototype and address comments

key_files.role: Related menu-rule header prototype cleanup replacing several unknown signatures with typed signatures.
Related name-menu header prototype cleanup replacing several unknown signatures with typed signatures.
Changed file listed by metadata, but exact diff is not present in loaded excerpt.

what_changed: PR body states this was WIP while the author cleaned up and gathered functions they had matches for.
Added C bodies in mndiagram.c for several previously stubbed functions, including three bot-reported 100% matches: mnDiagram_8023EA54, mnDiagram_8023FDD8, and fn_80240B18.
Added C bodies in mndiagram2.c, including bot-reported 100% match fn_80245028 and partial improvements for fn_80244D20 and mnDiagram2_802453B0.
Added fn_80246E04 in mndiagram3.c, reported by bot as a partial improvement.
Updated mndiagram.h, mnmainrule.h, mnname.h, mndiagram2.h, and mndiagram3.h with concrete prototypes and forward includes.
Added declarations for data/function dependencies such as mnDiagram_803EE774, mnDiagram2_803EEB60, mnDiagram3_803EEC10, HSD_Free, GObj/HSD helpers, and mn helper functions.
Author closed the draft with intent to reorganize across mndiagram, mndiagram2, and mndiagram3 rather than merge this slice.
smart_moves: Header prototypes were updated alongside recovered function bodies, reducing UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS exposure for many mn functions.
The code uses natural loops for totals/counts and digit emission rather than only duplicated generated blocks, matching the global natural-loops standard in spirit where supported by the diff.
The PR separated mndiagram2 and mndiagram3 prototypes into their respective headers instead of keeping only source-local knowledge for those new bodies.
The bot report provides narrow per-symbol score evidence, distinguishing fully matched functions from partial improvements.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When recovering menu diagram functions, update owning headers when bodies make argument and return types visible; this PR replaces many UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS prototypes in mndiagram.h, mnmainrule.h, and mnname.h.
Do not treat score-improving partial bodies as fully matched: this PR has bot-reported 100% matches for four functions but separate partial percentages for thirteen others.
evidence_refs: text_corpus:decomp-dev bot report lists 4 new matches and 13 improvements

decomp_lessons.lesson: Closed WIP PRs can still provide useful candidate shapes and search terms, but curator should preserve their draft/closed context and not infer acceptance or final style from them.

naming_conventions.convention: Address-style names such as mnDiagram_8023F334, fn_80240B18, and fn_80246E04 were retained for functions without semantic names in the PR evidence.
Local role names in the added code include gobj, jobj, data, table, ptr, total, count, field_index, digit_count, and original where the local role is apparent.

The PR introduces a temporary macro alias `#define GetNameText GetNameText_u8` around one function due to signature mismatch pressure; this is evidence of a local matching workaround, not an accepted naming convention.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use do-while reverse/forward scans for menu selection navigation where the scan decrements or increments before bounds checks, as seen in mnDiagram_8023F3A8, mnDiagram_8023F45C, and mnDiagram_8023F4CC.
Some partial matches rely on dummy locals or dummy arrays, e.g. `s32 dummy[4]`, `s32 dummy[8]`, and `int dummy`; these need verifier evidence before being treated as reviewable permanent style.

Several functions use raw pointer arithmetic into opaque data/GObj objects, such as offsets 0x2C, 0x0C, 0x38-0x48, 0xC4, and 0xD; useful for matching exploration, but type recovery should be considered before promoting this as finished style.
Animation-loop cleanup pattern appears in all three diagram files: fetch data from gobj, get jobj/table, compare mn_8022ED6C result with end frame/table entry, then call HSD_GObjPLink_80390228.

GObj/JObj setup in mnDiagram_802433AC uses GObj_Create, HSD_JObjLoadJoint, HSD_GObjObject_80390A70, GObj_SetupGXLink, and HSD_GObjProc_8038FD54; bot evidence reports this as a partial 93.38% improvement, not a match.

review_feedback.feedback: Author marked the PR as WIP while cleaning up and gathering functions with matches.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text:WIP while I clean up & gather the functions I have matches for

review_feedback.feedback: Author closed the PR to reorganize it with more matches across mndiagram, mndiagram2, and mndiagram3.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text:I'm gonna close this and reorganize it with some more matches I have across mndiagram, mndiagram2, mndiagram3

review_feedback.feedback: Automated report showed +392 matched bytes, 4 new 100% matches, and 13 partial improvements.

follow_up_queries: Search later PRs for reorganized mndiagram/mndiagram2/mndiagram3 work by itsgrimetime after PR #2080 closed.
Search for final merged versions of mnDiagram_8023EA54, mnDiagram_8023FDD8, fn_80240B18, and fn_80245028 to compare whether the 100% match bodies survived cleanup.
Search for later removal or replacement of dummy locals in GetNameTotalFalls, GetFighterTotalFalls, mnDiagram_802433AC, and fn_80244D20.
Search current source for typed structs or fields covering GObj data offsets 0x2C/0x0C, SIS handles at 0x38-0x48/0xC4, and gobj byte offset 0xD.
Search for later header prototype stabilization in src/melee/mn/mndiagram.h, mnmainrule.h, mnname.h, mndiagram2.h, and mndiagram3.h.
Search for use or removal of `GetNameText_u8` and the temporary `#define GetNameText GetNameText_u8` alias.

evidence_refs: raw_diff:truncated but includes relevant hunks for most changed files
notes: No review comments or human code review are present in the slice.
The raw diff is marked truncated, and exact mnnamenew.h diff content is not visible in the loaded evidence.
Bot report supports match/score status for listed functions, but no local build logs, objdiff command output, or reviewer acceptance evidence are included.
The PR was closed unmerged and described as WIP/reorganization work, so its code shapes should be treated as historical candidates rather than accepted project style.
Many added functions use raw pointer arithmetic, source-local externs, dummy locals, or a macro alias; the slice does not include enough evidence to decide whether these were necessary final tactics.

accepted_candidate_records.title: PR #2080 separates full matches from partial score improvements
accepted_candidate_records.text: For mndiagram WIP work, the bot report credited four new 100% matches while listing thirteen other functions only as partial improvements; future curation should preserve that distinction when mining shapes from this PR.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Closed WIP mndiagram PR should be mined as candidate evidence only
accepted_candidate_records.text: The author explicitly described the PR as WIP and closed it to reorganize with more matches across mndiagram, mndiagram2, and mndiagram3; do not infer merge acceptance from the slice.

source_update_candidates.title: Prototype cleanup should accompany recovered bodies in owning headers
source_update_candidates.text: When a decompiled body establishes a function's return type and parameters, update the owning header rather than leaving UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS or adding only local declarations. PR #2080 provides historical examples in mndiagram.h, mnmainrule.h, and mnname.h, but should be corroborated with merged PRs before promoting.
source_update_candidates.reason: Aligned with existing truthful-headers-and-includes standard, but PR is closed WIP, so only a candidate reinforcement.

source_update_candidates.title: Dummy locals in partial matches need explicit verifier evidence
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2080 contains dummy locals/arrays in several partial or exploratory bodies. This supports reinforcing that stack-shaping locals should not be treated as accepted style without narrow objdiff evidence and cleanup rationale.
source_update_candidates.reason: The PR evidence shows the tactic in WIP code but not final validation; route as standards reinforcement candidate only.

source_update_candidates.title: mndiagram family files are under src/melee/mn
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2080 changed mndiagram, mndiagram2, mndiagram3, and related mn headers under src/melee/mn for menu diagram work.
source_update_candidates.reason: Changed-file metadata supports this path grouping, but curator should decide whether path facts should be updated from a closed WIP PR.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the partial function bodies as accepted matches; the bot report labels them as improvements below 100%.
Do not infer reviewer approval or merge acceptance; the PR has no review comments and merged_at is null.
Do not promote raw pointer offsets, source-local externs, dummy locals, or the GetNameText macro alias as normal style from this PR alone.
Do not record exact mnnamenew.h content changes; the changed file is listed, but its diff is not visible in the loaded slice.
